title: Trump threatens to send ICE to airports on Monday amid DHS funding standoff
summary_full: President attacks ‘Radical Left Democrats’ after homeland security funding bill again sinks in SenateSign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inboxDonald Trump threatened on Saturday to deploy federal immigration agents to US airports on Monday if Democrats do not agree to measures aimed at strengthening security and immigration enforcement.“If the Radical Left Democrats don’t immediately sign an agreement to let our Country, in particular, our Airports, be FREE and SAFE again, I will move our brilliant and patriotic ICE Agents to the Airports,” Trump said in a Truth Social post.
